title: Cake Delight
description:
更改了蛋糕插上蜡烛的模型
Changed the model of the cake with candles inserted
body:
![在游戏中展示各种各样美味的蛋糕](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ff6beb69c891e5a315d74250750b4fbbace97df_0.webp)更改了蛋糕插上蜡烛的模型  
Changed the model of the cake with candles inserted  
使用打火石点燃蛋糕上的蜡烛可将蛋糕调整为切块的状态  
Using flint and steel to light the candles on a cake will convert it into a sliced state  
使用时请将材质包放置在最上方
Make sure this resource pack is placed at the top when using it.
